The Asclepias plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The bioactive constituents of Asclepias include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
